chunks.text: Cory 3F Networks Offline, Morning of Thurs. 4/25 | IRIS Skip to main content Skip to primary navigation Skip to primary sidebar Cory 3F Networks Offline, Morning of Thurs. 4/25 Due to planned electrical work, all Cory Hall third floor wired and wirel

al work, all Cory Hall third floor wired and wireless networks will be offline during the early morning tomorrow, April 25th. We expect the network to be unavailable beginning at 5AM, and all connectivity should be restored by 10AM at the latest. We

vity should be restored by 10AM at the latest. We apologize for the short notice; the need for this shutdown was only identified this afternoon. Please contact us at help@eecs.berkeley.edu if you have any questions or concerns. UPDATE [2024-04-25 | l

any questions or concerns. UPDATE [2024-04-25 | larsrohr ] This work was completed around 8:30am. Wireless connectivity in the area should resume normal operation by 9am. Resolved as of 2024-04-25 8:30am Primary Sidebar IRIS Service Status We have 0
